creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
As documented in UPDATING:

Firefox since 41.0 and SeaMonkey since 2.38 require databases/sqlite3 port built with DBSTAT option enabled (default). Re-run "make config" if the port(s) fail to build as described in ports/200853.

See:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/398725

Sorry for the difficulty, but that should fix it.
